chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-6374 of 2022 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Priority. 1. For orders on Misc. No.10365/2025 2. For orders on Misc. No.10576/2023 3. For hearing of Misc. No.27038/22 4. For hearing of Misc. No.27039/22 5. For hearing of main case. 26.05.2025. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Siddiqui, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Shahid Akhtar Awan, Advocate for Respondent. Ms. Humaira Jatoi, Counsel for SBCA. ------------------------------ Learned counsel for the petitioner and respondent submits that in the light of compliance report placed on record on 18.09.2024 this petition has become infructuous as the illegal portion on the subject plot has now been demolished. Accordingly the instant petition is hereby disposed of alongwith pending applications HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
